mapper.select:
SELECT environment_standard_id AS environmentStandardId, environment_type AS environmentType, environment_code AS environmentCode, environment_name AS environmentName, env_temp_min AS envTempMin, env_temp_max AS envTempMax, env_humidity_min AS envHumidityMin, env_humidity_max AS envHumidityMax, env_particle_limit AS envParticleLimit FROM environment_standard WHERE is_deleted = false
AND ( environment_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{request.keyword}, '%') OR environment_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{request.keyword}, '%') )
AND environment_type = #{request.environmentType}
ORDER BY environment_standard_id DESC

SELECT environment_standard_id AS environmentStandardId, environment_type AS environmentType, environment_code AS environmentCode, environment_name AS environmentName, env_temp_min AS envTempMin, env_temp_max AS envTempMax, env_humidity_min AS envHumidityMin, env_humidity_max AS envHumidityMax, env_particle_limit AS envParticleLimit FROM environment_standard WHERE environment_standard_id = #{environmentStandardId} AND is_deleted = false
SELECT environment_standard_id FROM environment_standard WHERE environment_code = #{environmentCode} AND is_deleted = false LIMIT 1
